/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/player/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/enemies/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/hud/menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/network/network_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/map/desert_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/map/city_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/glock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/ak47.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/minigun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/awp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/shotgun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/revolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/rpg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/weapons/knife.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/effects/particle_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/vehicles/vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/vehicles/tank.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/src/bosses/adas_gooner.cpp.o -o AdasGooner  "/home/tomasz/Desktop/adas gooner/include/linux64/libraylib.a" -lX11 -lGL -lm -ldl -lrt
